topic: Analyze Sui DEX accumulation and smart-money signals for SUI

sources.title: Sui DEX accumulation rows
sources.summary: Queried Sui DEX rows for accumulation candidates. Empty or partial provider coverage must be reported as a source gap.

sources.title: Sui RPC account context
sources.summary: Checked Sui account context where available. The workflow does not infer Ethereum token activity from Sui chain activity.

sources.title: Smart-money signal synthesis
sources.summary: Synthesized successful tool results into an analysis-only smart-money monitoring signal.

orchestrationSteps.summary: Detected a Sui analysis topic and selected Sui DEX, RPC, and synthesis tools.
Collected Sui evidence and recorded source gaps without fabricating data.
Prepared the decision hash and evidence URI for Sui decision_registry proof.

finalAnswer.title: Sui smart-money watch
finalAnswer.recommendation: Add the strongest source-backed signal to the Sui Alpha watchlist and record the Sui proof when proof env is configured.
finalAnswer.caveat: This is analysis-only. Langclaw did not sign, send, swap, buy, sell, or execute any trade.
